name: Meiloon Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Meiloon Industrial Co., Ltd. operates as an ODM/OEM manufacturer for audio systems and loudspeakers worldwide. It offers studio monitor, wireless and portable, in-wall/in-ceiling, professional audio, car, and garden speakers, as well as home theater systems and other products. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
